problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Combining Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
